goal_results.evidence: step_model.py: StepMeta class deleted; its fields (name, output_path_prefix, deps, hash_attrs, override_output_path) and properties (hash_id, name_with_hash, output_path) merged into StepSpec. fn made optional (None default). Single unified dataclass at lines 14-85.

step_runner.py: StepMeta import removed (line 36), resolve_executor_step constructs StepSpec directly with name/deps/override_output_path as top-level args (lines 211-221). All step.meta.X references replaced with step.X (lines 293-355). fn-is-None guard added (line 377).

test_step_runner.py: All StepSpec constructions flattened (no StepMeta nesting), assertions changed from .meta.deps to .deps. All 6 FAIL_TO_PASS tests pass: test_runner_executes_pipeline, test_runner_respects_dependency_order, test_runner_saves_artifact_automatically, test_resolve_executor_step_preserves_deps, test_artifact_save_and_load_typed, test_artifact_roundtrip_through_pipeline. test.sh reward=1.0.

__init__.py line 21: 'from .step_model import StepSpec, StepMeta' changed to 'from .step_model import StepSpec'. artifact.py: StepMeta removed from import (line 7), type annotations (lines 20-22), and isinstance check (line 26).

integration_nomagic_test.py: All StepSpec constructions flattened (identity fields passed directly, no StepMeta wrapper). draccus replaced with click: NoMagicConfig dataclass removed, @click.command() and @click.option decorators added, main() takes prefix/dry_run as plain args.

test_step_runner.py: resolve_deferred import removed (line 12 in original), ~80 lines of resolve_deferred tests deleted (test_resolve_deferred_simple, test_resolve_deferred_chain, test_resolve_deferred_runs_pipeline, test_resolve_deferred_diamond_dag, test_resolve_deferred_stable_hash) at lines 309-388.

judge_notes: All 6 goals fully met. The agent's patch cleanly merges StepMeta into StepSpec, updates step_runner, flattens test constructions, removes StepMeta from exports/type annotations, converts integration test from draccus to click, and removes resolve_deferred tests. test.sh confirms reward=1.0 with all 6 FAIL_TO_PASS tests passing. Score = 0.27+0.27+0.26+0.07+0.07+0.06 = 1.00.
